title: Tactical Arena
tagline: Seven warriors, real stat blocks, every tile a gamble.
description: A turn-based isometric tactics duel on a fantasy war-table — the successor to Mini-Tactics. Draft a custom squad from a roster of swordsmen, archers, mystics, magicians, paladins, necromancers, and snipers, each with their own stat block, ARTS abilities, passives, and status effects (blind, silence, poison, slow). Line up to-hit and crit rolls, block line-of-sight with bodies, raise cover walls, and burn the board. Play local hot-seat 1v1 or single-player vs CPU on three difficulties.
status: Playable — local hot-seat 1v1 and single-player vs CPU (3 difficulties)
